channel.title: Kicksecure 17.0.1.9 - for VirtualBox - Major Release - Debian 12 / bookworm based - Testers Wanted!
channel.description:
# Testers Wanted!
Download the Testers-Only version of Kicksecure for VirtualBox:
https://www.kicksecure.com/wiki/VirtualBox_Testers_Only_Version
----
# Upgrade
Alternatively, in-place release upgrade is possible upgrade using by performing a release upgrade.
https://www.kicksecure.com/wiki/Release_Upgrade
https://www.kicksecure.com/wiki/Release_Upgrade_16_to_17
----
This release would not have been possible without the numerous supporters of Kicksecure!
----
Please Donate!
https://www.kicksecure.com/wiki/Donate
Please Contribute!
https://www.kicksecure.com/wiki/Contribute
# Major Changes
* port to Debian 12 (`bookworm`) * renamed virtual machine images from `XFCE` to `Xfce` * go back to lightdm (https://forums.whonix.org/t/display-manager-lightdm-gdm3-sddm-or-no-display-manager-startx/12457) * enable zsh by default for new builds (https://forums.whonix.org/t/change-default-shell-from-bash-to-zsh-by-default/14792) * install auditd by default useful for aa-logprof
# Changelog
https://www.kicksecure.com/wiki/Changelog
----
# Full difference of all changes
[https://github.com/Kicksecure/derivative-maker/compare/16.1.1.5-developers-only...17.0.1.9-developers-only](https://github.com/Kicksecure/derivative-maker/compare/16.1.1.5-developers-only...17.0.1.9-developers-only)
----
(This testers wanted announcement might in future be [transformed](https://forums.whonix.org/t/transform-whonix-testers-wanted-forum-news-post-into-whonix-release-forum-news-post-ok/11405) into a stable release announcement if no major issues are found during the testing period.)

item.title: Kicksecure 17.0.1.9 - for VirtualBox - Major Release - Debian 12 / bookworm based - Testers Wanted!
item.dc:creator: Patrick
item.description:
Testers Wanted!

Download the Testers-Only version of Kicksecure for VirtualBox:

Kicksecure – 12 Dec 25

Kicksecure for Windows, macOS, Linux inside VirtualBox

Getting started with Kicksecure in 4 simple steps.

Upgrade

Alternatively, in-place release upgrade is possible upgrade using by performing a release upgrade.

Kicksecure – 1 Dec 25

Release Upgrade

What is a Release Upgrade?

Kicksecure – 3 Jan 26

Release Upgrade Kicksecure 16 to Kicksecure 17

How to Release Upgrade from Kicksecure 16 to Kicksecure 17

This release would not have been possible without the numerous supporters of Kicksecure!

Please Donate!

Kicksecure – 25 Dec 25

Donating to Kicksecure

PayPal, Bitcoin (BTC), Monero (XMR), Ethereum (ETH) or Token, Credit Card, Bank Wire, Others

Please Contribute!

Kicksecure – 7 Aug 25

Contribute to Kicksecure

Spread, Follow, Develop, Testing, Donate. Contribute to Freedom Software / Open Source.

Major Changes

  • port to Debian 12 (bookworm)
  • renamed virtual machine images from XFCE to Xfce
  • go back to lightdm (display manager - lightdm, gdm3, sddm or no display manager (startx) - Development - Whonix Forum)
  • enable zsh by default for new builds (Change default shell from bash to zsh by default? - Development - Whonix Forum)
  • install auditd by default useful for aa-logprof

Changelog

Kicksecure – 3 Dec 25

Changelog

Kicksecure Release Notes, Changelog

Full difference of all changes

https://github.com/Kicksecure/derivative-maker/compare/16.1.1.5-developers-only…17.0.1.9-developers-only

(This testers wanted announcement might in future be transformed into a stable release announcement if no major issues are found during the testing period.)

Read full topic
item.source: Kicksecure 17.0.1.9 - for VirtualBox - Major Release - Debian 12 / bookworm based - Testers Wanted!
